songs.title: 2 hands
feed: “2 hands” by Tate McRae reaches #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for the first time.
“2 hands” by Tate McRae reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 2 spots to #1.
“2 hands” by Tate McRae is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 16 sales units.
“2 hands” by Tate McRae is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 51 streams units.
“2 hands” by Tate McRae is the #1 most airplayed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 27 airplay units.
“2 hands” by Tate McRae is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 455,952 total units.
